prompt_used: Story: Black Chapel Ledger (black-chapel-ledger) | Hook: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money. | Subgenre: gothic horror | Tone: EERIE | Location: Cliffside cathedral archive district | Villain: The Creditor | Villain worldview: Every truth must be paid for, and mercy is fraud. | Motifs: ink-stained fingers, funeral bells, salt wax. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You close the cathedral operation but lose key testimony to fear." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
